2604.25578.title: Marco-MoE: Open Multilingual Mixture-of-Expert Language Models with Efficient Upcycling
2604.25578.paper_summary: We present Marco-MoE, a suite of fully open multilingual sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models. Marco-MoE features a highly sparse design in which only around 5\% of the total parameters are activated per input token. This extreme sparsity, combined with upcycling from dense models, enables efficient pre-training on 5T tokens. Our models surpass similarly-sized competitors on English and multilingual benchmarks, achieving a best-in-class performance-to-compute ratio. We further post-train these models to create Marco-MoE-\textsc{Instruct} variants, which surpass the performance of competing models possessing $3$--$14\times$ more activated parameters. Our analysis reveals that Marco-MoE learns structured expert activation patterns shared across related languages, while maintaining highly specialized utilization for linguistically isolated ones. We further show that Marco-MoE allows for scalable language expansion without the interference typical of dense models. To support the community, we disclose our full training datasets, recipes, and model weights.
2604.25578.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了Marco-MoE，一套完全開放的多語言稀疏專家混合模型（MoE）。<lb/>Marco-MoE具有高度稀疏的設計，每個輸入標記僅激活約5\%的總參數。<lb/>這種極端的稀疏性，加上從密集模型的升級，實現了在5T標記上的高效預訓練。<lb/>我們的模型在英語和多語言基準測試中超越了同類競爭者，達到了最佳的性能與計算比。<lb/>我們進一步對這些模型進行後訓練，創建Marco-MoE-\textsc{Instruct}變體，其性能超過了擁有$3$--$14\times$更多激活參數的競爭模型。<lb/>我們的分析顯示，Marco-MoE學習了在相關語言之間共享的結構化專家激活模式，同時對語言上孤立的語言保持高度專門化的利用。<lb/>我們進一步展示了Marco-MoE允許可擴展的語言擴展，而不會出現密集模型典型的干擾。<lb/>為了支持社群，我們公開了完整的訓練數據集、配方和模型權重。
2604.25578.author: Fan Jiang et.al.
2604.25578.authors: Fan Jiang, Yu Zhao, Chenyang Lyu, Tianqi Shi, Yichao Du, Feihu Jiang, Longyue Wang, Weihua Luo
